caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, pointed grey wig. He wears glasses and black headphones over his ears. He is positioned in front of a microphone with a black pop filter. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" shirt. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears in red and white text on both the left and right sides of the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, his mouth opening and closing as he gestures with his hands. In the later frames, he shifts his posture slightly and raises his left arm, while his facial expressions change to emphasize his speech.
